description_long: This is a modern single-story house set on a rectangular plot with a large green lawn at the rear and a sandy area at the front, separated by a paved driveway lined with trees and shrubs. The house features a flat roof, clean lines, and a minimalist design, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open to a patio or pool area. The property is bordered by a low fence or wall, and the landscaping includes palm trees and manicured bushes. The front of the house faces a sandy street, with a clear entryway and a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious grassy backyard, ideal for outdoor activities. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open space, natural light, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist design, set on a plot with a green lawn and sandy frontage. The property features landscaped trees, a driveway, and a spacious backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sandy street, driveway, landscaped trees, and the main entryway of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the division between the sandy area, driveway, and the green backyard, with the house positioned to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive green lawn, backyard, and the back facade of the house with patio access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house, driveway, and the transition from the green lawn to the sandy area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved approach, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a driveway.
